prevalence.source: SBD and occupational dermatology epidemiology syntheses
prevalence.trend: stable; increased recognition in workplace settings

burden.dalyPerCapita: low mortality; significant work disruption and chronic dermatitis burden

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Clinical dermatitis with exposure history; patch testing for allergic contact dermatitis

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate; depends on avoidance and occupational adjustments

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Clinical diagnosis in primary care and dermatology; patch testing in referral centers
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Avoidance of triggers, emollients, topical corticosteroids; workplace protection and PPE
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Limited access to patch testing and occupational health services in some regions
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Effective topical therapies and prevention strategies widely available
